AC: 6
STR: +9 AGI: +5
WT: 4.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: BAR ELF TRL OGR IKS VAH
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Slot: HEAD
AC: 6
STR: +9 AGI: +5
WT: 4.0 Size: SMALL

I wouldn't say that this helm is rare. I have camped other items I would actually consider rare that have a rarity status of "common" . . . common is what I would apply to this helm.

i bought this item for 50pp off a person in the bazaar and found out i cant wear it (im stupid dint check)and sold it back to a merchant for 100pp yea i had it planned out the entire time

graphic
QuoteReply
# Oct 02 2002 at 3:28 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757992542
62 posts
as of today, this helm now has a graphic in luclin! at first i thought i had a bug as i once in a while get, so i unequiped reequiped/zoned and such. tried this on two chars on diff servers. same graphic! woohoo! iksars get so jacked on helm graphics. now i dont have to put on a giant warrior helm to have a cool screenshot helm. pink plate on my BL. i love it

ps once saw bug with kylong helm: same helm but dark red. will test this later hope it works. must have helm graphic!!

Edited, Wed Oct 2 04:12:15 2002

Was letting em rot..
QuoteReply
# May 03 2002 at 10:45 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361141123
34 posts
I sell these to the vendor for about 75pp. Was in KC for 2 days for guild VS hunt, and we all looted one in time, and shouted many times about more sitting on the ground. MAYBE once someone got one.

400pp? hehe. Get invis (careful of skels), and run up and sit with the hands group if they don't need em. I bet we let 10 of em rot.

ac or stats?
QuoteReply
# Apr 30 2002 at 4:31 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591776864133
Sage
86 posts
I have one of these for my 15 barb warrior as well as a skull shaped barbute (ac13, 35hp, 10svm). Which one should I use? Should I go for the AC and HP at my level or the big str and agi bonus?
Thanks

Lancastro Shadowleaf 21 Druid
Kalos 15 Warrior
-The Dragonbone Fellowship-
Tholuxe Paells

Edited, Sat May 18 02:06:41 2002
▲ Page top
RE: ac or stats?
QuoteReply
# May 06 2002 at 6:49 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245876265
7 posts
Go with SSB for ac AND stats. 35hp is more important at lvl 15 then the str and agility for a barb, and SSB has more than twice the ac. My troll sk used his SSB until low 40s when I got my BE helm.
▲ Page top
Helm

__DEL__1592252466990

Not sure if this has been mentioned but some helms dont show using the new Luclin models...unless you switch on animations in your eqclient.ini file (or use the options when you first connect to the patch server).

Filroden
51 Vicar

I also have Luclin, and I bought one this morning for 150pp! When I put it on my Vah Shir warrior.. poof.. nothing.. :(

RE: I Wish I could see it
QuoteReply
# Jan 24 2002 at 11:15 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591754592848
View User Forum
3 posts
I saw a post on the EQ Developers forum that they know about this bug. There's a conflict between the Velious Armors & the new luclin models. If you want to see the helm, turn off all the new luclin player models.

For warrior anyway. you go to kurn towqer wait one hour or less and kill an odd mole it will drop a pendand that you can use to make the Trooper scale helm 12 ac and 1 less str i think. if you are a iksar warrior then find a med level friend and go kill a mole will cost ya less to.

I just bought one of these for my Shadow Knight for 300pp. This helm rocks in my opinion. So what if it looks a little goofy heh.

QuoteReply
# May 28 2001 at 9:05 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
what does this look like? on a necro itd be great for a platemail graphic cuz the only other way to get that for a caster is some like 5 k helm or 10k helm or somethin and this is like 500pp instead which could make for some sweet lookin iksar casters.
▲ Page top
RE: -graphic?
QuoteReply
# Oct 29 2001 at 7:05 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591759157191
View User Forum
Guru
179 posts
Hmmmm.

Is it really worth answering such a waaaaay old question???

The helm looks exactly like the Shestar scaled coif. (You see lotsa these on melee types, in FoB.) It is rather cool to see on a necro, simply because everyone is used to seeing the scaled coif. (And frankly, it's the best helm design I've seen for an Iksar. (I've seen the crown of the myrmidon and even that is a poor comparison,, graphically. (Which is not to say the stats aren't entirely drool-worthy.))

What is rather nice about this, is that since it is Iksar only, they go pretty cheaply. Not so good for the seller. Very good for the buyer. Hah!

AlAaraaf.
"Death is coming..."
▲ Page top
RE: -graphic?
QuoteReply
